text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Detoxification * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Deafness Homelessness Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access primary medical care, case management, advocacy, outpatient drug and alcohol treatment, drug detox, mental health evaluation, counseling, SSI/SSDI assistance from a public benefits specialist, OHP application assistance, and transportation to appointments. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Walk in services: Monday-Friday 9:30am-noon Scheduled case management appointments: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm Reception and phone assistance: Monday-Friday 9:30am-3pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST
